data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for service type routing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for service type routing (Counter A for simple tasks, Counter B for complex tasks). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for service type routing, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is fulfilled, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of service type routing validation provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify service type routing.
